creator: llwang@infor.org
text:
Please go ahead and change them to WITH_FIXED_FENV.  Thanks.

-- llwang

On Wed, Jan 25, 2012 at 8:05 AM, Michael Scheidell
<scheidell@freebsd.org> wrote:
> I will be asked by ports-developers@ to change this.
>
> do you mind?
>
> portlint -abt
> WARN: Makefile: [43]: is USE_FIXED_FENV a user-settable option? Consider
> using WITH_FIXED_FENV instead.
> WARN: Makefile: [83]: is USE_FIXED_FENV a user-settable option? Consider
> using WITH_FIXED_FENV instead.
> WARN: Makefile: [105]: is USE_FIXED_FENV a user-settable option? Consider
> using WITH_FIXED_FENV instead.
> WARN: Makefile: [118]: is USE_FIXED_FENV a user-settable option? Consider
> using WITH_FIXED_FENV instead.
>
> 'Makefile 'knobs' should be 'WITH_{OPTION}', not 'USE_'
> <http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/makefile-options.ht=
ml>
>
> 'USE_' vars should not be used like this..
> see:
>
> <http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/makefile-depend.htm=
l#USE-VARS>
>
>
>
> --
